snippet.title: LOL: Chi ride è fuori | Aftershow
snippet.description:
Dalle battute meno aspettate e le performance senza senso agli sguardi in silenzio sofferente. C’è un prima e un dopo “LOL: Chi ride fuori” e adesso, è il momento di scoprire come l’ha vissuta l’intero cast. 
Special thanks a Fedez, Mara, Elio, Frank, Michela, Pintus, Lillo, Luca, Katia, Ciro, Caterina e Fru.

Credits:
Location: Teatro Franco Parenti Milano
Casa di produzione: Don't Movie
Agenzia Creativa: Hello,
Regia: Lisa Gaspari
Direttore della fotografia: Marco Piva
Supervisione produzione: Endemol Shine

Sono anche in uscita le versioni francese e spagnola di LOL e presto potrete vederle qui, insieme alla seconda stagione di #LOLitalia, che è stata ufficialmente confermata per una seconda stagione.

Riguarda la prima stagione: www.primevideo.it

snippet.title: MANTIDE predatore finale - SCIENZA BRUTTA
snippet.description:
Grazie a NordVPN per aver supportato la divulgazione brutta! Potete avere il 70% di sconto sul piano biennale (2.85 €/mese) più 1 mese extra AGGRATIS usando questo link https://nordvpn.com/barbascurax o il codice "barbascurax".
Checkout NordVPN's videos on https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yCWNRzoQGis

--------------------------------------------------------------------
Un ringraziamento a:
Associazione culturale Settimo Continente (Roma, info@settimocontinente.com https://www.instagram.com/settimocontinente/?hl=it ) per la location.
 @ZooSparkle e LaGiada Naturalista (instagram @la_giada_naturalista) per la revisione dei testi.
Moreno Stefanuto e  @ThePio3D  per l'aiuto montaggio.
Emanuel Simeoni per il supporto logistico.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Per approfondire i temi trattati:
1) Burke, Nathan W., and Gregory I. Holwell. "Male coercion and female injury in a sexually cannibalistic mantis." Biology Letters 17.1 (2021): 20200811.
2) Brown, William D., and Katherine L. Barry. "Sexual cannibalism increases male material investment in offspring: quantifying terminal reproductive effort in a praying mantis." Proceedings of the Royal Society B: Biological Sciences 283.1833 (2016): 20160656.
3) Animalogic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aMdrI_zCrjo
4) Yager, David D. "15. Comparative Aspects of Rearing and Breeding Mantids." (1999).
5) Benoit, Amanda D., and Susan Kalisz. "Predator Effects on Plant-Pollinator Interactions, Plant Reproduction, Mating Systems, and Evolution." Annual Review of Ecology, Evolution, and Systematics 51 (2020): 319-340.
6) O'Hanlon, James C. "The Roles of Colour and Shape in Pollinator Deception in the Orchid Mantis Hymenopus coronatus." Ethology 120.7 (2014): 652-661.
7) Burrows, Malcolm, et al. "Mantises exchange angular momentum between three rotating body parts to jump precisely to targets." Current Biology 25.6 (2015): 786-789.
8) Rossoni, Sergio, and Jeremy E. Niven. "Prey speed influences the speed and structure of the raptorial strike of a ‘sit-and-wait’predator." Biology letters 16.5 (2020): 20200098.
9) https://www.nytimes.com/2020/05/14/science/praying-mantis-strike.html
10) Nyffeler, Martin, Michael R. Maxwell, and J. V. Remsen Jr. "Bird predation by praying mantises: a global perspective." The Wilson Journal of Ornithology 129.2 (2017): 331-344.
11) Birkhead, T. R., K. E. Lee, and P. Young. "Sexual cannibalism in the praying mantis Hierodula membranacea." Behaviour 106.1-2 (1988): 112-118.
12) Rilling, Susan, Horst Mittelstaedt, and K. D. Roeder. "Prey recognition in the praying mantis." Behaviour (1959): 164-184.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Potete recuperare gli episodi di 'Micromostri con Barbascura X' su Discovery+ https://www.discoveryplus.it/programmi/micromostri-con-barbascura-x oppure controllare quando ci saranno le repliche su DMAX.

Per recuperare i miei servizi per RAI3: https://www.raiplay.it/ricerca.html?q=barbascura

I miei libri: https://barbascurax.pocketfolio.net/libri-e-fumetti/

T-shirt e gadget: https://barbascurax.pocketfolio.net/

Unisciti alla ciurma! Raggiungici sugli altri social: https://barbascurax.pocketfolio.net/social/

00:00 SPONSOR

#SCIENZABRUTTA #ad

snippet.description:

Michael Towers @michael.towers
Nikunj Patel @spiralofsorts
Thomas Knowler @knowlerdraws

Compositors:
Jonathan Gallagher @grasptheview
Paul Cheshire @paul_cheshire
Adriano Vessichelli @adrianovessichelli

Editor: David Toba @ediztor

Lyrics:
THE WEEKND
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I’m not with you
But then you saw me caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eyes
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could’ve asked my why I broke your heart
You could’ve told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn’t there
And just pretended like you didn’t care
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another…
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
ARIANA GRANDE
Met you once under a Pisces moon
I kept my distance ‘cause I know that you
Don’t like when I’m with nobody else
I couldn’t help it, I put you through hell
I don’t know why I run away, oh boy
I make you cry when I run away
Boy take me back ‘cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that it’s much too late
And you deserve someone better
THE WEEKND & ARIANA GRANDE
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
I don’t know why, I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

#TheWeeknd #ArianaGrande #SaveYourTearsRemix

snippet.title: MANGIO TUTTI I PASTI DEI GENTLEMEN IN 20 MIN - @xMurry , @Maurizio Merluzzo e @DANNY LAZZARIN
snippet.description:
Ogni settimana nuovi video dei #Gentlemen​ sui canali di:
XMurry, Maurizio Merluzzo, Danny Lazzarin e Thomas Hungry

Ascolta la canzone dei Gentlemen su:
Spotify ► https://spoti.fi/3sRDjAm​​​
YouTube Music ► https://bit.ly/31Ke3Ab​​​
Amazon Music ► https://amzn.to/3sRLzQU​​​
Apple Music ► https://apple.co/3fH7tCx​​​

Sii un gentiluomo, indossa la T-Shirt dei Gentlemen ► https://bit.ly/3wu854j​​​

Una Produzione di The Best Blend




38% DI SCONTO SU MYPROTEIN ► http://tidd.ly/2d7831ec​
Codice sconto: HUNGRY

5% DI SCONTO SU FOOD2TRAIN ► https://food2train.com/​
Codice sconto: HUNGRY

MY SONGS ► https://www.epidemicsound.com/referra...​

SEGUIMI SU:
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/vgthomas1987/​

COLLABORAZIONI 
Email ► thomashungry1987@gmail.com

INVIAMI MATERIALE ► 
Thomas Marenduzzo
Via dalla chiesa 13
Grantorto (PD) 35010

“MANGIO TUTTI I PASTI DEI GENTLEMEN IN 20 MINUTI”

Ed eccomi qua ragazzi questa settimana pronto per affrontare una Gentlemen challenge!

Dopo aver resistito alle avance culinarie dei miei compagni Gentlemen durante un’appetitosa cena dove questi tre “personaggi” hanno deciso di ordinare pizza, hamburger e carne con rinforzo di patatine, escludendomi da questo delizioso banchetto per via di una strana prova di resistenza inversa nella quale dovevo resistere appunto a queste leccornie evitando di cedere in tentazioni mentre loro nutrivano il loro piccolo appetito, ho deciso di prendermi una rivincita!

In questa challenge improvvisata ho deciso di ordinare tutti i pasti consumati dai Gentlemen in questa deliziosa cena e di smantellarli tutti in meno di venti minuti (ovvero il tempo impiegato da quest’ultimi per terminare questo convito)

In questa rivincita considerando che ho indossato la mia divisa da Gentlemen, mi sarò limitato a gustare queste prelibatezze lasciando così una piccola possibilità di vittoria agli altri, o il lato Hungry avrà preso il sopravvento facendomi spazzolare i loro pasti prima dello scadere del tempo pattuito!?

Ovviamente lo scoprirete solo gustandovi il primo episodio di questa nuova collaborazione con i GENTLEMEN!

Se ti è piaciuto il video come sempre iscriviti al mio canale e condividi!!!

Noi ci vediamo al prossimo video... e nel frattempo...
STAY FIT!! &
STAY HUNGRY!!

snippet.title: Record negativi: le PEGGIORI squadre della Serie A!
snippet.description:
Quali sono state le squadre peggiori della Serie A? Quelle che hanno fatto meno punti, che hanno vinto di meno, che hanno subito più gol, che hanno perso di più? Abbiamo deciso di raccontarvi le loro storie in una sorta di "Flop 10": dal Benevento 2017/18 al Parma 2014/15, passando per il Treviso 2005/2006 e per due pessime stagioni di Pescara e Cesena!

#benevento #seriea #flop10
Record negativi: le PEGGIORI squadre della Serie A!

snippet.title: Oscar 2021 - Ecco tutti i vincitori di una strana serata
snippet.description:
Oscar 2021 - Ecco tutti i vincitori di una strana serata


Si è conclusa poche ore fa una Notte degli Oscar decisamente anomala. Ovviamente non parliamo solo dell’eccezionalità dovuta alla pandemia, che ha reso la cerimonia più intima, con molti meno invitati e con qualche ospite in collegamento da altre parti del mondo.

L’Academy ha optato per una serata molto sobria, per niente spettacolare, ma che si è rivelata non solo noiosa ma a tratti completamente assurda per l’ordine con cui sono stati assegnati i premi.

Il premio alla regia, di solito il penultimo della serata, è stato assegnato a poco meno di metà cerimonia, mentre il premio più importante e atteso, quello al miglior film, che da sempre chiude la premiazione è stato assegnato prima dei due premi alla migliore attrice e al miglior attore. Una scelta scellerata che di fatto ha tolto ogni mordente allo spettacolo.
Premi che da una parte hanno rispettato molti pronostici, ma che hanno regalato anche qualche grande sorpresa.

Scopriamo tutto nel dettaglio nel nostro riepilogo in cui vi raccontiamo tutti i vincitori di questa stramba notte degli Oscar 2021.


Testo: Giuseppe Grossi
Voce e montaggio: Gabriele Scarcelli

snippet.title: Exit Poll i Noto & RTV Ora: Japim të parët rezultatet  | Ora e Vendimit
snippet.description:
#oranews #rtvora #edicioniilajmeve #lajme

Sot është ora e vendimit. Janë 3,588,869 shtetas shqiptarë me të drejtë vote, të cilët janë thirrur për të hedhur votën e tyre në 5,199 qendra votimi.  Qendrat e votimit do të qëndrojnë të hapura deri në orën 19:00.

Vëmendje: Në orën 19:00 RTV ora dhe Ora Neës në bashkëpunim me Antonio Noton do të do të publikojë exit pollin më të besuar. Do të njiheni me rezultatin e zgjedhjeve përpara se ai të bëhet zyrtar.

Një grup prej mbi 200 gazetarësh ndodhen në terren për të përcjellë live nga çdo cep i Shqipërisë.

Follow TV Ora dhe RTV Ora News

Subscribe To "Ora News" on YouTube Channel for NEWS HERE: http://bit.ly/2DDddtL

localized.title: Exit Poll i Noto & RTV Ora: Japim të parët rezultatet  | Ora e Vendimit
localized.description:
#oranews #rtvora #edicioniilajmeve #lajme

Sot është ora e vendimit. Janë 3,588,869 shtetas shqiptarë me të drejtë vote, të cilët janë thirrur për të hedhur votën e tyre në 5,199 qendra votimi.  Qendrat e votimit do të qëndrojnë të hapura deri në orën 19:00.

Vëmendje: Në orën 19:00 RTV ora dhe Ora Neës në bashkëpunim me Antonio Noton do të do të publikojë exit pollin më të besuar. Do të njiheni me rezultatin e zgjedhjeve përpara se ai të bëhet zyrtar.

Një grup prej mbi 200 gazetarësh ndodhen në terren për të përcjellë live nga çdo cep i Shqipërisë.

snippet.title: Flet i riu që ndali shoferin në sheshin “Skënderbej”: Ngjante si akt terrorist! - Vizion Plus
snippet.description:
http://www.vizionplus.tv
https://facebook.com/VizionPlusTV
https://twitter.com/VizionPlusTV
I riu që neutralizoi drejtuesin e mjetit  tip “Citroen” që u fut në shesh, duke tentuar të përplasë kalimtarët, e përshkroi ngjarjen si një akt terrorist.Në një prononcim për mediat, i riu tha se ndërhyri menjëherë në mënyrë që mos të lëndoheshin njerëzit që po lëviznin në shesh.“Po vinte drejt njerëzve. Unë ndërhyra. Kishte shumë qytetarë përreth. Hyri i aksidental brenda këtu. Në momentin që unë hyra, u ndal personi. Ai u shokua kur i rashë në fytyrë nga xhami. Nuk kam informacion dhe nuk e njoh se kush është. Ishte si një akt terrorist”, tha i riu.Drejtuesi i mjetit ka përfunduar në prangat e policisë, ndërsa mësohet se në makinë i janë gjetur doza kanabisi.

snippet.title: COREANI REAGISCONO A “LOL - CHI RIDE È FUORI"
snippet.description:
-------------LEGGIMI! -------------- 
🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕

Ciao a tutti!

Oggi i nostri amici coreani guarderanno per la prima il programma del momento: LOL - chi ride è fuori 😂

Ho pensato che sarebbe stata un'ottima occasione per far capire un po' meglio la differenza di umorismo tra i due paesi, oltre a farci due sane risate che non guastano mai.

Riuscirà il Posaman di Lillo a far ridere i nostri eroi? O sarà forse il famoso "hai cagato?" a dare il colpo di grazia?

Nel dubbio, mi riguardo un po' del tip tap di Elio.

Vi voglio bene!

Pizza, Carbonara...CIAO!

🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕

it.title: COREANI REAGISCONO A “LOL - CHI RIDE È FUORI"
it.description:
-------------LEGGIMI! -------------- 
🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕

Ciao a tutti!

Oggi i nostri amici coreani guarderanno per la prima il programma del momento: LOL - chi ride è fuori 😂

Ho pensato che sarebbe stata un'ottima occasione per far capire un po' meglio la differenza di umorismo tra i due paesi, oltre a farci due sane risate che non guastano mai.

Riuscirà il Posaman di Lillo a far ridere i nostri eroi? O sarà forse il famoso "hai cagato?" a dare il colpo di grazia?

Nel dubbio, mi riguardo un po' del tip tap di Elio.

Vi voglio bene!

Pizza, Carbonara...CIAO!

🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕🍕

✨ hype Testo :-)
[Strofa 1]
Ora che parlano
Ne sei affascinata
Non ti vedo più pura
E mi mette paura
Sembri la mia ex
Quella pazza malata
E non è da te
Forse non sei cambiata
Ma chi vuoi che sia
A darti un po' di amore
Se ci hai bruciati con della benzina

[Ritornello]
Dici che è finito anche l'hype
Ma tu che cosa ne sai se poi
Ritorni indietro e fa più male
Spogliarmi di quello che vuoi
Che tanto poi te ne vai
E lasci scritto non contare mai sui di me

[Strofa 2]
E le tue foto girano ed impazzisco
E tu eri già impazzita
Quando hai visto il mio profilo Insta
Forse mi ami solo per questo
Forse i miei sono solo pеnsieri sbagliati
Come dici tu
Ma mettiti in tеsta
Che un diamante non ti renderà bella di prima

snippet.title: Dove fare COLAZIONE a MILANO
snippet.description:
Aprile 2021.
La colazione, si sa, è il pasto più importante della giornata.
Forse abbiamo preso un po' troppo alla lettera questa affermazione, ma lo abbiamo fatto per una giustissima causa: portarvi a scoprire i posti che, secondo noi, offrono le migliori colazioni in città.

Siamo stati da:
- Loste Cafè, via Francesco Guicciardini 3, Milano
- Pavè, via Felice Casati 27, Milano
- Marlà Pasticceria, corso Lodi 15, Milano

Seguiteci su:
- Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/cosamangiamooggi
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cosamangiamooggi
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/GianoeFranci/

---------------------------------------------------------------

Se volete supportare il canale potete effettuare una donazione qui: https://streamlabs.com/cosamangiamooggi/tip

Se volete sapere:
- che attrezzatura usiamo per il canale 📽
- quali sono i nostri libri di cucina preferiti 📚
- cosa usiamo per cucinare 🍳
trovate tutto qui https://www.amazon.it/shop/cosamangiamooggi

Dove prendiamo le musiche per i nostri video:
https://www.epidemicsound.com/referral/g3gzvu/

#cosamangiamooggi #foodblogger #colazione

---------------------------------------------------------------

Per contatti: gianoefranci@gmail.com

---------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Oscars 2021: Yuh-Jung Youn wins Best Supporting Actress, first-ever Korean actor to win Oscar| ABC7
snippet.description: Yuh-Jung Youn claimed the Oscar for best supporting actress Sunday night for her performance in "Minari" as a grandmother who moves from South Korea to live with her daughter's farming family in Arkansas. snippet.title: Perseverance Rover's Mastcam-Z Captures Ingenuity's Third Flight
snippet.description:
NASA’s Ingenuity Mars Helicopter takes off and lands in this video captured on April 25, 2021, by Mastcam-Z, an imager aboard NASA’s Perseverance Mars rover. As expected, the helicopter flew out of its field of vision while completing a flight plan that took it 164 feet (50 meters) downrange of the landing spot. Keep watching, the helicopter will return to stick the landing. Top speed for today's flight was about 2 meters per second, or about 4.5 miles-per-hour.

The Ingenuity Mars Helicopter was built by JPL, which also manages this technology demonstration project for NASA Headquarters. It is supported by NASA’s Science Mission Directorate, Aeronautics Research Mission Directorate, and Space Technology Mission Directorate. NASA’s Ames Research Center and Langley Research Center provided significant flight performance analysis and technical assistance during Ingenuity’s development.

A key objective for Perseverance’s mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet’s geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith (broken rock and dust). 

Subsequent NASA missions, in cooperation with ESA (European Space Agency), would send spacecraft to Mars to collect these sealed samples from the surface and return them to Earth for in-depth analysis.

The Mars 2020 Perseverance mission is part of NASA’s Moon to Mars exploration approach, which includes Artemis missions to the Moon that will help prepare for human exploration of the Red Planet.

JPL, which is managed for NASA by Caltech in Pasadena, California, built and manages operations of the Perseverance rover.

For more about Perseverance:
-mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
-nasa.gov/perseverance

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech/ASU/MSSS

snippet.title: ATLANTIS - IL PLAGIO DELLA DISNEY
snippet.description:
Atlantis - L'impero perduto è un altro storico flop (per quanto minore) della Disney. Ma la storia è davvero tutta farina del loro sacco, o la Disney si è "ispirata" a qualcos'altro nel realizzare il film?..

snippet.title: I 3 Gesù Cristo: un crudele esperimento
snippet.description:
I tre Gesù Cristo di Ypsilanti è un famoso libro scritto da Milton Rókeach, dove riporta dettagliatamente gli esiti di un esperimento condotto da lui alla fine degli anni ’50. I tre soggetti del suo esperimento erano pazienti di uno psichiatrico, tutti convinti di essere Gesù Cristo. Per curarli, Milton ebbe un’idea…quella di metterli insieme e il risultato fu davvero sorprendente. 

00:00 - 01:07  Introduzione
01:08 - 08:15  Storia dell'esperimento
08:16 - 10:23  Conclusioni

Vieni a trovarmi sul mio nuovo canale “L’Inspiegabile ON AIR” -- https://bit.ly/3iIH4SO 

Scaricati gratuitamente la nuova versione dell'app "L'Inspiegabile", con tantissime nuove funzionalità e contenuti esclusivi. La nuova versione dell'app la trovi a questi link:

zh-TW.title: I 3耶穌基督：殘酷的實驗
zh-TW.description:
伊普西蘭蒂(Ypsilanti)的《三個耶穌基督》是米爾頓·羅卡奇(MiltonRókeach)著名的著作，其中詳述了他在1950年代後期進行的實驗的結果。他的實驗的三名受試者都是精神病患者，他們都確信他們是耶穌基督。為了治愈它們，彌爾頓有個主意……將它們放在一起，結果確實很棒。

00:00-01:07簡介
01:08-08:15實驗的歷史
08:16-10:23結論

zh-CN.title: 我3耶稣基督：残酷的实验
zh-CN.description:
伊普西兰蒂(Ypsilanti)的《三耶稣基督》是米尔顿·罗卡奇(MiltonRókeach)着名的著作，他在那里详细报道了他在1950年代后期进行的实验的结果。他的实验的三名受试者都是精神病患者，所有人都确信他们是耶稣基督。为了治愈它们，弥尔顿有一个主意……将它们放在一起，结果确实令人惊讶。

en.title: I 3 Jesus Christ: a cruel experiment
en.description:
The Three Jesus Christ by Ypsilanti is a famous book written by Milton Rókeach, where he reports in detail the results of an experiment conducted by him in the late 1950s. The three subjects of his experiment were patients of a psychiatric, all convinced that they were Jesus Christ. To cure them, Milton had an idea ... that of putting them together and the result was truly amazing.

00:00-01:07 Introduction
01:08-08:15 History of the experiment
08:16-10:23 Conclusions

be.title: I 3 Ісус Хрыстос: жорсткі эксперымент
be.description:
Тры Ісуса Хрыста Іпсіланці-вядомая кніга, напісаная Мілтанам Рокічам, дзе ён падрабязна паведамляе пра вынікі эксперыменту, праведзенага ім у канцы 1950-х. Тры суб'екта яго эксперыменту былі пацыентамі псіхіятра, усе яны былі ўпэўненыя, што гэта Ісус Хрыстос. Каб вылечыць іх, у Мілтана была ідэя ... што сабраць іх разам і вынік быў сапраўды дзіўны.

00:00-01:07 Уводзіны
01:08-08:15 Гісторыя эксперыменту
08:16-10:23 Высновы

Прыходзьце да мяне на мой новы канал "L’Inspiegabile ON AIR"-https://bit.ly/3iIH4SO

pt.title: I 3 Jesus Cristo: um experimento cruel
pt.description:
Os Três Jesus Cristo de Ypsilanti é um famoso livro escrito por Milton Rókeach, onde ele relata em detalhes os resultados de um experimento realizado por ele no final dos anos 1950. Os três sujeitos de seu experimento eram pacientes de um psiquiatra, todos convencidos de que eram Jesus Cristo. Para curá-los, Milton teve uma ideia ... a de colocá-los juntos e o resultado foi realmente incrível.

00:00-01:07 Introdução
01:08-08:15 História do experimento
08:16-10:23 Conclusões

es.title: I 3 Jesucristo: un experimento cruel
es.description:
Los Tres Jesucristo de Ypsilanti es un famoso libro escrito por Milton Rókeach, donde informa en detalle los resultados de un experimento realizado por él a finales de la década de 1950. Los tres sujetos de su experimento eran pacientes de un psiquiátrico, todos convencidos de que eran Jesucristo. Para curarlos, Milton tuvo una idea ... la de juntarlos y el resultado fue realmente asombroso.

fr.title: I 3 Jésus-Christ: une expérience cruelle
fr.description:
Les Trois Jésus-Christ d'Ypsilanti est un livre célèbre écrit par Milton Rókeach, où il rapporte en détail les résultats d'une expérience menée par lui à la fin des années 1950. Les trois sujets de son expérience étaient des patients d'un psychiatre, tous convaincus d'être Jésus-Christ. Pour les guérir, Milton a eu une idée ... celle de les assembler et le résultat était vraiment incroyable.

00:00-01:07 Présentation
01:08-08:15 Historique de l'expérience
08:16-10:23 Conclusions

de.title: I 3 Jesus Christus: ein grausames Experiment
de.description:
Die drei Jesus Christus von Ypsilanti ist ein berühmtes Buch von Milton Rókeach, in dem er ausführlich über die Ergebnisse eines von ihm Ende der 1950er Jahre durchgeführten Experiments berichtet. Die drei Probanden seines Experiments waren psychiatrische Patienten, die alle davon überzeugt waren, dass sie Jesus Christus waren. Um sie zu heilen, hatte Milton die Idee, sie zusammenzusetzen, und das Ergebnis war wirklich erstaunlich.

00:00-01:07 Einführung
01:08-08:15 Geschichte des Experiments
08:16-10:23 Schlussfolgerungen

snippet.title: Marco Werner takes out Jean Alesi after thrilling battle for first in Monaco Historique 2021!
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE ► http://bit.ly/SubscribeSkyF1
There was drama at the Monaco Historique where veteran driver Jean Alesi was taken out by Marco Werner. Alesi was leading the 1973-76 F1 era car race and holding off a determined second placed Werner. But with just three laps remaining Werner's Lotus 77 ran into the back Alesi's Ferrari 312B3, ending Alesi's race and putting Werner into the lead.

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by world’s worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

As part of the program, guests can order a few dishes before their arrival in the show and "work" for their dishes by doing farm work and housework. snippet.title: THE CONJURING: PER ORDINE DEL DIAVOLO – Trailer Ufficiale Italiano
snippet.description:
Una storia vera, basata sui casi di Ed e Lorraine Warren. 
#TheConjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo, dal 3 giugno al cinema.

"The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo" narra un'agghiacciante storia di terrore, 
omicidio e male oscuro, che ha sconvolto persino gli investigatori del paranormale Ed e Lorraine Warren. Uno dei casi più sensazionali da loro affrontati, inizia con la lotta per l'anima di un ragazzo, che ha portato i due demonologi a cose mai viste prima, segnando la prima volta nella storia degli Stati Uniti in cui un sospetto omicida avrebbe reclamato la sua possessione demoniaca come difesa.

Vera Farmiga e Patrick Wilson tornano a recitare nei panni di Lorraine e Ed Warren, sotto la direzione di Michael Chaves ("La Llorona – le lacrime del male"). Fanno parte del cast del film Ruairi O'Connor ("The Spanish Princess" di Starz), Sarah Catherine Hook ("Monsterland" di Hulu) e Julian Hilliard (le serie "Penny Dreadful: City of Angels" e "Hill House").

"The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo" è prodotto da James Wan e Peter Safran, che hanno già collaborato a tutti i film dell'universo di "The Conjuring". Chaves ha diretto il film da una sceneggiatura di David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick ("The Conjuring 2– Il caso Enfield", "Aquaman"), una storia di James Wan e David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, basata sui personaggi creati da Chad Hayes e Carey W. Hayes. I produttori esecutivi sono Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott e Michelle Morrissey.

La squadra creativa che ha lavorato dietro le quinte ha riunito i collaboratori dell'universo di “The Conjuring” tra cui il direttore della fotografia Michael Burgess, la scenografa Jennifer Spence, la costumista Leah Butler e il compositore Joseph Bishara, insieme al montatore del regista di “La Llorona – le lacrime del male”, Peter Gvozdas e Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).

 “The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo” è il settimo film dell'universo di "The Conjuring”, il più grande franchise horror della storia, che ha incassato più di 1,8 miliardi di dollari in tutto il mondo. Ne fanno parte i primi due capitoli di "The Conjuring", nonché "Annabelle" e "Annabelle 2: Creation", "The Nun – la Vocazione del Male" e "Annabelle 3".

New Line Cinema presenta una produzione Atomic Monster / Peter Safran, "The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo", che sarà distribuita da Warner Bros. Pictures, e uscirà al cinema in Italia dal 3 giugno 2021.

"The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo" è prodotto da James Wan e Peter Safran, che hanno già collaborato a tutti i film dell'universo di "The Conjuring". Chaves ha diretto il film da una sceneggiatura di David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick ("The Conjuring 2– Il caso Enfield", "Aquaman"), una storia di James Wan e David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, basata sui personaggi creati da Chad Hayes e Carey W. Hayes. I produttori esecutivi sono Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott e Michelle Morrissey.

La squadra creativa che ha lavorato dietro le quinte ha riunito i collaboratori dell'universo di “The Conjuring” tra cui il direttore della fotografia Michael Burgess, la scenografa Jennifer Spence, la costumista Leah Butler e il compositore Joseph Bishara, insieme al montatore del regista di “La Llorona – le lacrime del male”, Peter Gvozdas e Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).

 “The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo” è il settimo film dell'universo di "The Conjuring”, il più grande franchise horror della storia, che ha incassato più di 1,8 miliardi di dollari in tutto il mondo. Ne fanno parte i primi due capitoli di "The Conjuring", nonché "Annabelle" e "Annabelle 2: Creation", "The Nun – la Vocazione del Male" e "Annabelle 3".

New Line Cinema presenta una produzione Atomic Monster / Peter Safran, "The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo", che sarà distribuita da Warner Bros. Pictures, e uscirà al cinema in Italia dal 3 giugno 2021.

snippet.title: New Punjabi Movie 2021 | Tu Mera Ki Lagda | Latest Punjabi Movies 2021 Full Movie | Goyal Music
snippet.description:
After success of "Kurmaiyan", Winner’s Film presents New Punjabi Movie 2021 Tu Mera Ki Lagda with Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Prince KJ Singh in lead & Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema as Spl. Enjoy this Latest Punjabi Movies 2021 Full Movie. Other cast includes Nisha Bano, Jashjit Gosha, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh and Hit songs are sung by R Nait, Harjit Harman, Ninja, Sudesh Kumari, Shipra Goyal. Film is Directed by Manjeet Tony & Gurmeet Saajan. 


Lead Cast: Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Gurpreet Bhangu, Prince KJ Singh, Nisha Bano, Chacha Bishna, Mintu jatt, Parveen Akhtar, Jashjit Gosha, Bhola Layalpuria, Satwant Kaur, Parm Sidhu, Roop Kaur Sandhu, Mini Mehar mital, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh

Special Apperance: Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema

Singers: R Nait, Harjit Harman, Ninja, Sudesh Kumari, Shipra Goyal

Music Director: Atul Sharma, Laddi Gill, Ikwinder Singh, Dj Strings
 
Lyrics: Bachan Bedil, R Nait, Bittu Mehal Kalan, Harmanjeet, Amanpreet Bajwa, Vicky Dhaliwal 

Music Label: Goyal Music 

Original Background Score: Salil Amrute (U.K)

Assistant Editor: Garry Singh

Sound Design & Mixing: Sameer Shelar (Mumbai)

Di: Sanklan Media PVT. LTD

Colorist: Pushpendra Surywanshi 

Director Of Photography: Barinder Sidhu

Choreographer: Narsh Shikari

Art: Abhijit Singh (Attlai)

Asociate Director: Bikram Gill

Cheaf Ad: Gurmeet Photogenic

Ad: Gurbhej Singh, Subham Sharma, Angrej Mannan, Ladi Algon, Mangal Matta

Still: Studio Photogenic (KKP), Mangal Verma

Line Producer: Amarjit Khurana

Motion Grafix: Harprit Kang (FX Tantra)

Poster Design: Mika Singh

Dress:  Navdeep Agoria 

Visual Promotion:  Edit Point 

Promos: Raj Maan, Bakhshinder Singh 

Producer - Gurmeet Saajan

Associate Producer - Happy Goyal, Baghi Sandhu Rurka kalan (uk)

Co-Producer Satnam Batra, Gurmeet Singh, Bhola layalpuria

Written & Directed By - Manjeet Tony, Gurmeet Saajan

Synopsis of “Tu Mera Ki Lagda”

Manjot (Harjit Harman) and Sarbi (Shefali Sharma) meets in a marriage and they both started loving each other. The love affair reaches to marriage but the parents of Sarbi do not want to marry their daughter to a rich family. Because there elder daughter (Jaspreet Kaur) marry herself to a rich guy Harjot (Ravinder Grewal) on her own terms.

But the parents of Harjot did not accept their relationship. Parents of Sarbi don’t want to face again what they saw happening with their elder daughter.

Further, the story goes through its twisting turns to show, whether Manjot and Sarbi would be able to meet, would their families be united.

all these questions are answered in an entertaining way in the film “Tu Mera Ki Lagda”

#TMKL #TuMeraKiLagda

ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਫ਼ਿਲਮ "ਕੁੜਮਾਈਆਂ"
ਦੀ ਸਫਲਤਾ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਅਦ

ਵਿਨਰਜ਼  ਫਿਲਮ ਪ੍ਰੋਡਕਸ਼ਨ ਗੋਇਲ ਮਿਊਜ਼ਿਕ ਦੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਨਾਲ ਪੇਸ਼ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ
"ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਕੀ ਲਗਦਾ"

ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਹਰਜੀਤ ਹਰਮਨ, ਯੋਗਰਾਜ ਸਿੰਘ, ਸ਼ੀਫਾਲੀ ਸ਼ਰਮਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ, ਗੁਰਪ੍ਰੀਤ ਭੰਗੂ, ਪਿ੍ੰਸ ਕੇ ਜੇ ਸਿੰਘ, ਨਿਸ਼ਾ ਬਾਨੋ ਤੇ ਹੋਰ ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਸਿਨੇਮਾ ਦੇ ਬਹੁਤ ਅਦਾਕਾਰ

ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਰਵਿੰਦਰ ਗਰੇਵਾਲ, ਜਸਪਿੰਦਰ ਚੀਮਾ

ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ

ਸਹਿਯੋਗੀ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਹੈਪੀ ਗੋਇਲ, ਬਾਗ਼ੀ ਸੰਧੂ ਰੁੜਕਾ ਕਲਾਂ ( ਯੂਕੇ )

ਲੇਖਕ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਦੇਸ਼ਿਤ - ਮਨਜੀਤ ਟੋਨੀ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ


ਸਹਿ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਸਤਨਾਮ ਬੱਤਰਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਿੰਘ,ਭੋਲਾ ਲੈਲਪੁਰੀਅਾ.


#NewPunjabiMovie2021  #LetastPunjabiMovie2021 #PunjabiMovies

ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਹਰਜੀਤ ਹਰਮਨ, ਯੋਗਰਾਜ ਸਿੰਘ, ਸ਼ੀਫਾਲੀ ਸ਼ਰਮਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ, ਗੁਰਪ੍ਰੀਤ ਭੰਗੂ, ਪਿ੍ੰਸ ਕੇ ਜੇ ਸਿੰਘ, ਨਿਸ਼ਾ ਬਾਨੋ ਤੇ ਹੋਰ ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਸਿਨੇਮਾ ਦੇ ਬਹੁਤ ਅਦਾਕਾਰ

ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਕਲਾਕਾਰ - ਰਵਿੰਦਰ ਗਰੇਵਾਲ, ਜਸਪਿੰਦਰ ਚੀਮਾ

ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ

ਸਹਿਯੋਗੀ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਹੈਪੀ ਗੋਇਲ, ਬਾਗ਼ੀ ਸੰਧੂ ਰੁੜਕਾ ਕਲਾਂ ( ਯੂਕੇ )

ਲੇਖਕ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਦੇਸ਼ਿਤ - ਮਨਜੀਤ ਟੋਨੀ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ


ਸਹਿ ਨਿਰਮਾਤਾ - ਸਤਨਾਮ ਬੱਤਰਾ, ਗੁਰਮੀਤ ਸਿੰਘ,ਭੋਲਾ ਲੈਲਪੁਰੀਅਾ.


#NewPunjabiMovie2021  #LetastPunjabiMovie2021 #PunjabiMovies

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Launch
snippet.description:
SpaceX and NASA are targeting Friday, April 23 for Falcon 9’s launch of Dragon’s second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous launch window opens at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, with a backup opportunity available on Monday, April 26 at 4:38 a.m. EDT, 8:38 UTC. 

Following stage separation, Falcon 9’s first stage will land on the “Of Course I Still Love You” droneship, which will be stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. On Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC, Dragon is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station.

This is the first human spaceflight mission to fly astronauts on a flight-proven Falcon 9 and Dragon. The Falcon 9 first stage supporting this mission previously launched the Crew-1 mission in November 2020 and the Dragon spacecraft previously flew Robert Behnken and Douglas Hurley to and from the International Space Station during SpaceX’s Demo-2 mission in 2020. 

The webcast will go live approximately 4 hours ahead of launch.

Mucha cadena, mucha vaina pero eso pa’ un carajo te sirvió ya te pelamos la banana, usted tuvo una reina en frente pero no la vio
Aquí esta Heavy la demanda, eso lo sabes tu y lo se yo pero jugaste con la cartaque no era y ahora tu jueguito ni lo viste se jodió

RAM PAM PAM 
Cerramos la reja, mami didn't raise no pendeja. Ahora tengo las pestañas, mira las cejas, dile a tu amigo que te aconseja que no me escriba ya yo tengo pareja. Estás viendo a to estos aquí, están haciendo fila toditos pa’mi. Quieres negarlo, Lo se ya entendí. Estoy mejor sin ti y ahora mi culo hace...

Ram Pam Pam Pam, Ram pam pam pamno me busques que aquí no queda nah, nah de nah y me hace Ram Pam Pam pam,Ram Pam Pam pam, tengo otro que me lleva a la disco a perrear

Natti Natasha (verso)

Dj subelo oh oh, subelo oh oh que esa musica me encanta
Dj subelo oh oh, subelo oh oh porque... Ram pam pam

Ya tu sabes 
te quedaste afuera te bote la llave
ahora tengo a otro y más rico me cabe
ya tu sabes amargo y el más rico y suave. Ya te dije adios
la nena se reveló , no te quiero man
el pasado se quedó
ya no tengo tiempo ya no tengo reloj
ahora me voy pata abajo y llegó cuando quiero yo.

LLora nene, llora llora
todo el mundo tiene reemplazo
llora nene, llora llora
eres un atraso y ahora tengo un novio nuevo que me hace...

Ram Pam Pam Pam, Ram pam pam pam
no me busques que aquí no queda nah, nah de nah y me hace Ram Pam Pam pam,Ram Pam Pam pam, tengo otro que me lleva a la disco a perrear

Dj subelo oh oh, subelo oh oh porque...Ram pam pam

Natti Natt (Be Becky)

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. snippet.title: Rally Croatia: Decided On the Final Corner - Day 3 Highlights | WRC 2021
snippet.description:
► Watch Rally Croatia on Red Bull TV: http://win.gs/rallycroatia

Frenchman clinches 51st career win to move top of the WRC standings.
Sébastien Ogier claimed a breathtaking last-gasp victory at the Croatia Rally on Sunday afternoon in the third closest FIA World Rally Championship finish in history.
After a remarkable final day to Croatia’s maiden WRC appearance, the world champion relegated Toyota Yaris team-mate Elfyn Evans in the final kilometres to win the three-day rally by 0.6sec.
Thierry Neuville finished third in a Hyundai i20, 7.5sec further back, but the facts do scant justice to the drama of a rally that will live long in the memory.
The trio fought tooth and nail from Friday’s start on Croatia’s slippery roads near Zagreb. After trading places on several occasions, the final day opened with Ogier leading Evans by 6.9sec, despite a second leg puncture, and just over 10sec blanketing the three drivers.
The drama unfolded when Ogier was involved in a road traffic collision en route to the opening speed test. Nobody was injured but the impact damaged the Yaris’ bodywork and the crucial aero package.
Evans capitalised on Ogier’s problems to win the first two tests and the Welshman started the final 14km live TV Wolf Power Stage with a 3.9sec advantage, as Belgian Neuville still chased both.
Interim times revealed Ogier closing on the Welshman before Evans slid wide onto a grass verge near the finish. It was the break Ogier needed and he scorched across the finish to record his 51st career victory, seal a Toyota one-two and regain the championship lead.
“The emotion for us now is super strong,” admitted Ogier. “It’s been a crazy rollercoaster for us between the puncture and the issue this morning. I was glad to be still in the rally honestly. I guess that’s why we do this sport, for this emotion.”
Neuville encountered his fair share of troubles during the weekend, including a poor tyre choice, spin and a missed junction in that final stage that meant the Belgian had to settle for third.
Ott Tänak finished fourth after never feeling totally comfortable with his i20 but the Estonian had more than 90sec in hand over Adrian Fourmaux in fifth. It was a hugely impressive top-level debut for Fourmaux, who twice set second fastest times in his Ford Fiesta.
Takamoto Katsuta scored his third consecutive sixth place finish in another Yaris.
The championship heads to the first of a series of four gravel rallies at Vodafone Rally de Portugal next month. Matosinhos hosts the event on 20 – 23 May.

Final positions

1. S Ogier / J Ingrassia FRA Toyota Yaris 2hr 51min 22.9sec
2. E Evans / S Martin GBR Toyota Yaris +0.6sec
3. T Neuville / M Wydaeghe BEL Hyundai i20 +8.1sec
4. O Tänak / M Järveoja EST Hyundai i20 +1min 25.1sec
5. A Fourmaux / R Jamoul FRA Ford Fiesta +3min 09.7sec
6. T Katsuta / D Barritt GBR Toyota Yaris +3min 31.8sec

FIA World Rally Championship (after round 3 of 12)
1. S Ogier 61pts
2. T Neuville 53pts
3. E Evans 51pts

localized.title: Rally Croatia: Decided On the Final Corner - Day 3 Highlights | WRC 2021
localized.description:
► Watch Rally Croatia on Red Bull TV: http://win.gs/rallycroatia

Frenchman clinches 51st career win to move top of the WRC standings.
Sébastien Ogier claimed a breathtaking last-gasp victory at the Croatia Rally on Sunday afternoon in the third closest FIA World Rally Championship finish in history.
After a remarkable final day to Croatia’s maiden WRC appearance, the world champion relegated Toyota Yaris team-mate Elfyn Evans in the final kilometres to win the three-day rally by 0.6sec.
Thierry Neuville finished third in a Hyundai i20, 7.5sec further back, but the facts do scant justice to the drama of a rally that will live long in the memory.
The trio fought tooth and nail from Friday’s start on Croatia’s slippery roads near Zagreb. After trading places on several occasions, the final day opened with Ogier leading Evans by 6.9sec, despite a second leg puncture, and just over 10sec blanketing the three drivers.
The drama unfolded when Ogier was involved in a road traffic collision en route to the opening speed test. Nobody was injured but the impact damaged the Yaris’ bodywork and the crucial aero package.
Evans capitalised on Ogier’s problems to win the first two tests and the Welshman started the final 14km live TV Wolf Power Stage with a 3.9sec advantage, as Belgian Neuville still chased both.
Interim times revealed Ogier closing on the Welshman before Evans slid wide onto a grass verge near the finish. It was the break Ogier needed and he scorched across the finish to record his 51st career victory, seal a Toyota one-two and regain the championship lead.
“The emotion for us now is super strong,” admitted Ogier. “It’s been a crazy rollercoaster for us between the puncture and the issue this morning. I was glad to be still in the rally honestly. I guess that’s why we do this sport, for this emotion.”
Neuville encountered his fair share of troubles during the weekend, including a poor tyre choice, spin and a missed junction in that final stage that meant the Belgian had to settle for third.
Ott Tänak finished fourth after never feeling totally comfortable with his i20 but the Estonian had more than 90sec in hand over Adrian Fourmaux in fifth. It was a hugely impressive top-level debut for Fourmaux, who twice set second fastest times in his Ford Fiesta.
Takamoto Katsuta scored his third consecutive sixth place finish in another Yaris.
The championship heads to the first of a series of four gravel rallies at Vodafone Rally de Portugal next month. Matosinhos hosts the event on 20 – 23 May.

Final positions

1. S Ogier / J Ingrassia FRA Toyota Yaris 2hr 51min 22.9sec
2. E Evans / S Martin GBR Toyota Yaris +0.6sec
3. T Neuville / M Wydaeghe BEL Hyundai i20 +8.1sec
4. O Tänak / M Järveoja EST Hyundai i20 +1min 25.1sec
5. A Fourmaux / R Jamoul FRA Ford Fiesta +3min 09.7sec
6. T Katsuta / D Barritt GBR Toyota Yaris +3min 31.8sec

FIA World Rally Championship (after round 3 of 12)
1. S Ogier 61pts
2. T Neuville 53pts
3. E Evans 51pts
#wrc #rallycroatia #rallying

snippet.title: Singaporean in London attacked, saved by livestreamer
snippet.description:
Singaporean student Raymond Hing, 21, is seen being assaulted in real-time in London. 

The attack was recorded by YouTuber “Sherwin”, who had been doing a livestream. Sherwin’s video shows him rushing to the aid of Mr Hing, shouting repeatedly at the attacker to “Leave him alone!”

The attacker makes a lunge for Mr Hing’s bicycle, before running away.

localized.title: Singaporean in London attacked, saved by livestreamer
localized.description:
Singaporean student Raymond Hing, 21, is seen being assaulted in real-time in London. 

The attack was recorded by YouTuber “Sherwin”, who had been doing a livestream. Sherwin’s video shows him rushing to the aid of Mr Hing, shouting repeatedly at the attacker to “Leave him alone!”

The attacker makes a lunge for Mr Hing’s bicycle, before running away.

===========

snippet.title: Personal: Massimo Pericolo racconta il suo presente, i suoi dubbi e le sue ansie
snippet.description:
Attenzione: l'intervista contiene riferimenti espliciti a depressione, abuso di sostanze e violenza.

Massimo Pericolo ha ammesso più volte che il suo secondo disco 'SOLO TUTTO' è stato difficile da scrivere: si sono messi in mezzo la fama e il successo conquistati con il primo 'Scialla Semper', ma anche la pandemia globale che ha fermato le vite di tutti—e se non fai esperienze di cosa scrivi? Abbiamo invitato Alessandro sulla poltrona di Noisey Personal per indagare un po’ più a fondo la sua visione quantomeno particolare del mondo.

Intervista di Giacomo Stefanini.

Segui Noisey Italia su Instagram: https://instagram.com/noiseyit
Segui Noisey Italia su Facebook: http://fb.com/noiseyit

**

snippet.title: MANGIARE CIBO DI UN SOLO COLORE PER 24 ORE || L’Ultimo A Smettere Di Mangiare su 123 GO! CHALLENGE
snippet.description:
Ma che bella giornata!! Cosa potrebbe mai andare storto?!

Ma che accidenti? Non può essere!!

UN METEORITE! AHH!!!!!

WOW!!!

Siamo in una specie di oasi viola?!

Ma cos’è?!

 

Mangeresti uno di questi cibi viola? Condividi questo video con i tuoi amici e fate anche voi la sfida del cibo viola!! Fateci sapere come va!

 

E questi li hai già visti? Iscriviti al nostro canale YouTube per non perdere il divertimento!

 

#123go #cibo #challenge #mukbang
Questo video è realizzato a scopo di intrattenimento; Non ne garantiamo la completezza e l'affidabilità. Qualsiasi azione venga intrapresa è a proprio rischio e pericolo e non saremo responsabili per danni o perdite. É responsabilità dello spettatore usare giudizio, cura e precauzioni se intende replicare.
Il seguente video mostra l'attività di attori professionisti in un ambiente controllato- usate precauzioni e giudizio se intendete replicare.

snippet.description:
وأخيرا عرفنا دهب الأغراب اللي اختفى في العركة الكبيرة راح فين #نسل_الأغراب #خلي_رمضانك_ON#ON

جزء من الحلقة الثالثة عشر من مسلسل #نسل_الاغراب
يتناول العمل في إطار درامي اجتماعي قصة من قصص المجتمع الصعيدي المصري، فبعد اتهامه بالقتل وقضاء فترة عقوبة طويلة بالسجن، يخرج فيجد صديقه قد تزوج من امرأته ونسب ابنه إليه، فيقرر الانتقام منه.

يعرض مسلسل "نسل الاغراب" على قناة on الساعة 7:45 مساء، يوميًا خلال شهر رمضان

#نسل_الاغراب
#امير_كرارة
#احمد_السقا

تأليف : محمد سامي
إخراج : محمد سامي
إنتاج سينرجي تامر مرسي

اشترك في قناة الرسمية: http://bit.ly/ONtvEG

snippet.description:

Not a problem, we have Miss Chewing Gum to kick the bad guys out of your mouth! How does a french fry feel being dipped in ketchup? Or a steak being massaged? Let’s keep watching and find out! snippet.title: Watch NASA's SpaceX Crew-2 Mission Arrive at the International Space Station
snippet.description: Tune in live as the Crew Dragon Endeavour spacecraft docks to the International Space Station with astronauts Shane Kimbrough, Megan McArthur of NASA, Thomas Pesquet of ESA (European Space Agency), and Akihiko Hoshide of JAXA (Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency) aboard. The four astronauts will begin a six-month science mission on the station. Docking is scheduled to occur at  5:10 a.m. EDT (9:10 a.m. UTC), Saturday, April 24,  followed by the hatch opening at 7:15 a.m. EDT (11:15 a.m. UTC), and a welcome ceremony at 7:45 a.m. EDT (11:45 a.m. UTC) Saturday, April 24.

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Approach and Docking
snippet.description:
On Friday, April 23 at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, SpaceX and NASA launched Dragon’s second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida. Following stage separation, Falcon 9’s first stage landed on the “Of Course I Still Love You” droneship, stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. 

Crew-2 is currently in orbit and is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station on Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC.

Following stage separation, Falcon 9’s first stage landed on the “Of Course I Still Love You” droneship, stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. 

Crew-2 is currently in orbit and is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station on Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC.

snippet.title: Vocea de înger care ne-a lăsat fără cuvinte, Irina Murgu cântă Ave Maria la Românii au talent 2021
snippet.description:
Cele mai tari momente din culise cu Pavel Bartos și Smiley din sezonul 11 al show-ului Romanii au talent! 

Irina Murgu are 13 ani și vin din Odobești Vâlcea. E pasionată de muzică clasică și impresionează juriul cu vocea ei angelică și cu interpretarea impecabilă a piesei. 

#pavelbartos​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #romaniiautalent​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #smiley​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #muzicaromaneasca​​​ #romania​​​ #avemaria #pavarotti #protv​​​ #romaniamea​​​​​ #emotie​​​​​ #talent​​​​​​ #gottalent​​​​ #talentshow​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #andimoisescu​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #smiley​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #andra​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #alexandradinu​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #florincalinescu​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #sezon11​​​​​​​​​​​​​

Urmărește-mă pe Facebook
https://m.facebook.com/pavelbartos.ro​​
​
​
​
​
​

Urmărește-mă pe Instagram
https://instagram.com/pavelbartos​​
​
​

Urmărește-mă pe TikTok 
https://vm.tiktok.com/sXba2v/​​
​
​
​
​
​
​
​Urmărește-mă pe Twitter 
https://mobile.twitter.com/pavelbartosh​
​
​
​
​
​
​
Românii au Talent este un show tv difuzat de postul PRO TV, în cadrul căruia românii care cântă, dansează sau se pricep să facă lucruri interesante se luptă pentru premiul cel mare,
Dinamismul show-ului va fi întreținut de gazdele emisiunii Smiley și Pavel Bartoș, care vor fi în permanență alături de concurenți și îi vor susține mai energic ca niciodată.
Jurații, Andi Moisescu, Andra, Alexandra Dinu și Florin Călinescu, sunt pregătiți să fie uimiți de diversitatea reprezentațiilor și de abilitățile extraordinare ale participanților și, cel mai important, să găsească cel mai talentat concurent din 2021.

snippet.title: Apple Event — April 20
snippet.description:

To watch the event interpreted in American Sign Language (ASL), please click here https://youtu.be/TWIHE9yEdOw 

00:00 Introduction 

04:51 iPhone 12 
06:06 AirTag 
10:36 Apple TV 
18:21 iMac
36:34 iPad Pro

'The Darkness You Fear' - The Chemical Brothers 
'The Candy Man' - Aubrey Woods http://apple.co/TheCandyMan
'Every Color' - Louis The Child, Foster the People http://apple.co/EveryColor

‘HIGH' - BAYNK http://apple.co/High
'Carrera' - Brokenstra & YADAM http://apple.co/Carrera

'Celeryjuice' - Party Favor http://apple.co/Celeryjuice

'Dream State' - Son Lux http://apple.co/DreamState

snippet.title: Race Highlights | 2021 DHL Valencia E-Prix | Round 5
snippet.description:
The first ever visit race visit to Spain for the ABB FIA Formula E Championship saw DS TECHEETAH driver Antonio Felix da Costa start the #DHLValenciaEPrix on pole. Could the reigning champion go on to win his first race of Season 7? Find out here.

Watch Formula E racing: http://www.FIAFormulaE.com/Watch
Subscribe for more ABB Formula E: http://bit.ly/2QwPZwC

Race Tickets:
http://bit.ly/2BQtwTc
 
Like Us On Facebook: http://bit.ly/2KUMavM
Follow Us On Twitter: http://bit.ly/2APCvlP
Follow Us On Instagram: http://bit.ly/2APK1Nj
Watch our Instagram Stories: http://bit.ly/2UeiYo4
 
Welcome to the closest, most intense racing series on the planet. We bring unpredictable wheel-to-wheel combat to the city streets.
 
We race on the streets of the world's most progressive cities, in 5 continents. We take wheel-to-wheel racing to the streets. That means tighter turns, close combat and plenty of unforgiving concrete.
 
Formula E brings racing tech to the road. With major global car brands going head to head, Formula E is more than just a racing series - it's a battle for the future. Our cars, powered by pure electricity, pave the way for the cars of tomorrow.

The global electric street racing series. We are #PositivelyCharged

snippet.title: Shqiptarët vendosin, Maratona Zgjedhore, në 19:00 Exit Poll- i
snippet.description:
#oranews #rtvora #edicioniilajmeve #lajme

Sot është ora e vendimit. Janë 3,588,869 shtetas shqiptarë me të drejtë vote, të cilët janë thirrur për të hedhur votën e tyre në 5,199 qendra votimi.  Qendrat e votimit do të qëndrojnë të hapura deri në orën 19:00.

Vëmendje: Në orën 19:00 RTV ora dhe Ora Neës në bashkëpunim me Antonio Noton do të do të publikojë exit pollin më të besuar. Do të njiheni me rezultatin e zgjedhjeve përpara se ai të bëhet zyrtar.

Një grup prej mbi 200 gazetarësh ndodhen në terren për të përcjellë live nga çdo cep i Shqipërisë.

snippet.title: AX Armani Exchange Milan - FC Bayern Munich Highlights | Turkish Airlines EuroLeague, PO Game 2
snippet.description:
AX Armani Exchange Milan moved within one victory of its first Turkish Airlines EuroLeague Final Four in 29 years with a hard-fought 80-69 win at home over FC Bayern Munich for a 2-0 lead in their best-of-5 series. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continent’s two premier men’s basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport’s premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: IL MIO PRANZO DELLA DOMENICA  #75  ( Apr'21)
snippet.description:
Buongiorno e ben ritrovati al consueto appuntamento   con il menù della domenica. 
 Anche questa settimana vi propongo un primo, un secondo e un dolce adatti ad essere preparati in questa stagione, e indicati per il vostro pranzo della domenica o per qualunque occasione importante.
Il menù consiste in orecchiette al forno,  petto di pollo alla caprese e torta di carote
 Se il video ti è piaciuto lascia un LIKE e , se ancora non l'hai fatto, ISCRIVITI al canale per non per perderti il prossimo.
 CLICCA ANCHE SULLA CAMPANELLA PER ATTIVARE LE NOTIFICHE
#pranzodelladomenica​​

LEGGI TUTTE LE MIE RICETTE QUI: http://ritaskitchen.org/​​
SEGUIMI SU FACEBOOK QUI:  https://www.facebook.com/CuocaRita/​​
SEGUIMI SU INSTAGRAM QUI: https://www.instagram.com/lacucinadir​​...

INFO SUI PRODOTTI CHE UTILIZZO: https://ritaskitchen.org/il-negozio-d​​...

COSA USO PER GIRARE I MIEI VIDEO:
telecamera: https://amzn.to/3msMSmw​​
treppiede: https://amzn.to/3kfW0ci​​
luci: https://amzn.to/2ZF7bTN​​
reflex: https://amzn.to/33Dfe4M​

INGREDIENTI
-CARBONARA DI CARCIOFI (per 4 persone):  400 g di paccheri, 2 carciofi romaneschi ( o comunque grandi) 150 g di pancetta, 2 uova, 4 cucchiai di pecorino, sale, pepe, olio extravergine, prezzemolo
-FAGOTTINI DI FRITTATA AGLI ASPARAGI: 4 uova, 20 asparagi, 2 cucchiai di parmigiano, 100 g di prosciutto cotto, 150 g di formaggio morbido affettato, sale, pepe, olio extravergine
-MILLEFOGLIE CON CREMA  E FRAGOLE: PER PREPARARE LA CREMA leggi QUI:  http://ritaskitchen.org/2014/04/13/crema-pasticcera-custard/         
 1 rotolo di pasta sfoglia rettangolare , qualche cucchiaio di zucchero, 200 g di fragole. Per la crema: 500 ml di latte fresco, 140 g di zucchero, 2 uova intere, 1 stecca di vaniglia oppure la buccia di un limone, 50 g di farina

__________________
INGREDIENTS
- ARTICHOKES CARBONARA (for 4 people): 400 g of paccheri, 2 Roman artichokes (or anyway large) 150 g of bacon, 2 eggs, 4 tablespoons of pecorino, salt, pepper, extra virgin olive oil, parsley
-FAGOTTINI DI FRITTATA WITH ASPARAGUS: 4 eggs, 20 asparagus, 2 tablespoons of parmesan, 100 g of cooked ham, 150 g of sliced soft cheese, salt, pepper, extra virgin olive oil
-MILLLE LEAVES WITH CREAM AND STRAWBERRIES: TO PREPARE THE CREAM read HERE: http://ritaskitchen.org/2014/04/13/crema-pasticcera-custard/
  1 roll of rectangular puff pastry, a few tablespoons of sugar, 200 g of strawberries. For the cream: 500 ml of fresh milk, 140 g of sugar, 2 whole eggs, 1 vanilla pod or the peel of a lemon, 50 g of flour

_________________
INGREDIENTES
-CARBONARA DI ALCACHOFAS (para 4 personas): 400 g de paccheri, 2 alcachofas romanas (o al menos grandes) 150 g de tocino, 2 huevos, 4 cucharadas de pecorino, sal, pimienta, aceite de oliva virgen extra, perejil
-FAGOTTINI DI FRITTATA CON ESPÁRRAGOS: 4 huevos, 20 espárragos, 2 cucharadas de parmesano, 100 g de jamón cocido, 150 g de queso blando en lonchas, sal, pimienta, aceite de oliva virgen extra
- HOJAS DE MOLINO CON CREMA Y FRESAS: PARA PREPARAR LA CREMA leer AQUÍ: http://ritaskitchen.org/2014/04/13/crema-pasticcera-custard/
  1 rollo de hojaldre rectangular, unas cucharadas de azúcar, 200 g de fresas. Para la nata: 500 ml de leche fresca, 140 g de azúcar, 2 huevos enteros, 1 vaina de vainilla o la piel de un limón, 50 g de harina

___________________
INGRÉDIENTS
-CARBONARA DI ARTICHOKES (pour 4 personnes): 400 g de paccheri, 2 artichauts romains (ou en tout cas gros) 150 g de bacon, 2 œufs, 4 cuillères à soupe de pecorino, sel, poivre, huile d'olive extra vierge, persil
-FAGOTTINI DI FRITTATA AUX ASPERGES: 4 œufs, 20 asperges, 2 cuillères à soupe de parmesan, 100 g de jambon cuit, 150 g de fromage à pâte molle en tranches, sel, poivre, huile d'olive extra vierge
- FEUILLES DE MILLLE À LA CRÈME ET AUX FRAISES: POUR PRÉPARER LA CRÈME, lisez ICI: http://ritaskitchen.org/2014/04/13/crema-pasticcera-custard/
  1 rouleau de pâte feuilletée rectangulaire, quelques cuillères à soupe de sucre, 200 g de fraises. Pour la crème: 500 ml de lait frais, 140 g de sucre, 2 œufs entiers, 1 gousse de vanille ou le zeste d'un citron, 50 g de farine

snippet.title: Dernier hommage à Idriss Déby au Tchad, en présence d’Emmanuel Macron
snippet.description:
Une douzaine de chefs d'État seront présents, vendredi, lors de la cérémonie d’hommage dans la capitaine tchadienne en l’honneur du défunt président Idriss Déby Itno, mort à 68 ans, des suites de blessures subies au front contre des rebelles. 

Abonnez-vous à notre chaîne sur YouTube : http://f24.my/youtube
En DIRECT - Suivez FRANCE 24 ici : http://f24.my/YTliveFR

Notre site : http://www.france24.com/fr/

snippet.title: Mahamat Idriss Déby, nouveau chef de l'Etat au Tchad, promet de ne pas "confisquer" le pouvoir
snippet.description:
Au Tchad, un Conseil militaire de transition a été mis en place, à sa tête, Mahamat Déby, fils du défunt président Idriss Déby. Le nouveau leader du pays, chef de l'Etat et des armées, sera donc entouré de 15 généraux, eux-mêmes connus pour être dans le cercle des plus fidèles d'Idriss Déby.

Abonnez-vous à notre chaîne sur YouTube : http://f24.my/youtube
En DIRECT - Suivez FRANCE 24 ici : http://f24.my/YTliveFR

Notre site : http://www.france24.com/fr/

snippet.title: অবশেষে খোঁজ মিলল সেই সাবমেরিনের! যা উদ্ধার হলও, ভারত যে বাংলাদেশের বন্ধু, তা বিবেচনার সময় এসেছেঃপাপন
snippet.description:
🔴 জরুরী সতর্কবার্তাঃ- bayanno tv তে প্রচারিত প্রতিটি ভিডিওর অথেন্টিক সোর্স রয়েছে... তাই এই চ্যানেলে কোন ধরনের গুজব বা মিথ্যা খবর প্রচার করা হয় না। 
সাধারণত গুরুত্বপূর্ণ ও স্পর্শকাতর নিউজগুলোর সত্যতা নিশ্চিত করার জন্য আসল খবরের উৎস বা সোর্স লিংক গুলো ভিডিওর ডেস্ক্রিপশন বক্সে এবং কমেন্ট বক্সের উপরে পিন করে দেয়া হয়ে থাকে তাই খবরগুলোর সত্যতা যাচাই না করেই নিজে বিভ্রান্ত না হয়ে এবং অন্যকেও বিভ্রান্ত না করার জন্য অনুরোধ করা হল।

❂ তথ্যসূত্রঃ  (খবরের অরজিনাল লিংক) 
     👇👇👇👇👇👇👇👇👇
📰
📰
📰
📰

❂ প্রিয় দর্শক #bayannotv থেকে প্রচারিত সকল সংবাদ ও ভিডিও গুলো দেশের স্বনামধন্য বিভিন্ন অনলাইন নিউজ সাইট/পোর্টাল, গুগল, উইকিপিডিয়া এবং বিভিন্ন অনলাইন সোর্স থেকে সংগ্রহ করা হয়ে থাকে । অতএব,  এসব নিউজের সাথে আমাদের চ্যানেলের সরাসরি কোন সংশ্লিষটতা নেই। 
তবে বায়ান্ন টিভির পক্ষ থেকে আন্তরিকতার সাথে সর্বোচ্চ চেষ্টা করা হয়  আপনাদের কাছে সঠিক ও নির্ভুল সংবাদগুলো  পৌঁছে দিতে। 


 ❂ ভিডিও গুলো ভালো লাগলে লাইক দিয়ে আপনার ফেইসবুক বন্ধুদের সাথে শেয়ার করুন। নিয়মিত ভিডিও দেখতে #52tv সাবস্ক্রাইব করে পাশে থাকা বেল আইকন টি প্রেস করুন ধন্যাবাদ।
Subscribe here:  https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_ffe39SiRx3TSodRAkTdEQ?sub_confirmation=1

অনুগ্রহ করে আমাদের চ্যানেলের ভিডিও কপি করা থেকে বিরত থাকুন।


Fair Use Disclaimer: 
=================

snippet.title: Gunmen Attack Governor Uzodinma’s House In Imo
snippet.description:
Gunmen have attacked the country home of Imo State Governor, Hope Uzodinma in Omuma, Oru East Local Government Area of the state

They were said to have invaded the Governor’s village house in the early hours of Saturday, before torching it.

The Commissioner of Information in the state, Declan Emelumba, confirmed the attack to Channels Television via a telephone conversation.

snippet.title: Highlights stages 1-4 / WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Kalle Rovanperä crashing on SS1, what a disappointing start for the young championship leader...
Follow the event live on WRC.com: https://www.wrc.com/en/wrcplus/live-timing/

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com​

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/​

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com​

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/es...​

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/​

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_...​

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally​

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/​

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC​

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter Röhrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott Tänak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi Mäkinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Grönholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with Sébastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion Sébastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi Räikkönen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018 and 2020. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

localized.description:
Kalle Rovanperä crashing on SS1, what a disappointing start for the young championship leader...
Follow the event live on WRC.com: https://www.wrc.com/en/wrcplus/live-timing/

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com​

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/​

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com​

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/​

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC​

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter Röhrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott Tänak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi Mäkinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Grönholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with Sébastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion Sébastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi Räikkönen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018 and 2020. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com
